name: eks_fargate
explanation: EKS Fargate generates heartbeat and capacity metrics for pods running on Fargate virtual nodes. The check inherits `KubeletBase` and obtains the kubelet URL via `kubeutil.get_connection_info()`, which the Agent populates from in-cluster ServiceAccount credentials (mounted bearer token + CA cert). Detection of Fargate mode is done by inspecting the `DD_KUBERNETES_KUBELET_NODENAME` env var for the substring `fargate`. The integration ships a `conf.yaml.default` template with `ad_identifiers: [_eks_fargate]`, so Autodiscovery already schedules the check when the Agent runs in an EKS Fargate pod. No user-supplied required fields drive endpoint resolution; credentials are auto-injected like other in-cluster integrations (pattern O).
notes: Pattern O (in-cluster bearer-token auth) plus an `_eks_fargate` AD identifier. Auto-config trigger is 'Agent pod is on a Fargate virtual node' (env var + kubelet reachability); credentials are auto-injected, not user-supplied.
